# Requirements for GitHub Actions PR Review with Azure OpenAI
# Updated: November 2024

# Azure OpenAI and Authentication
openai==1.45.0
azure-identity==1.15.0
azure-core==1.29.5

# HTTP and networking
requests==2.31.0
urllib3==2.0.7

# Data processing
pydantic==2.5.0

# Async support
aiohttp==3.9.1
asyncio-throttle==1.0.2

# Utilities
python-dotenv==1.0.0
pathlib2==2.3.7

# Security and code analysis (optional, for enhanced reviews)
bandit==1.7.5
safety==2.3.5

# Text processing
markdown==3.5.1
pygments==2.17.2
